findings.description: Multiple hyperlinked URLs and email addresses from PDF page 8 appear as plain text in the HTML without <a href> wrapping.
findings.evidence: PDF page 8 shows clickable hyperlinks for: 'https://deq.nc.gov/documents/15a-ncac-02k-0224-additional-requirements-dams-impound-coal-combustion-residual', 'Andrew.brooks@ncdenr.gov', and 'daniel.kang@ncdenr.gov'. All three appear as plain text in the HTML with no <a> tags.

findings.description: One image has empty alt text (alt="") but based on its full-page width (792.2pt) it may correspond to the city skyline banner from page 1, which is a substantive photograph rather than a purely decorative element.
findings.evidence: HTML: — PDF page 1 bottom shows a panoramic city skyline photograph that is substantive content.
